recommendations.title: Carrie Pilby
recommendations.overview: Awkward, isolated and disapproving of most of the people around her, a precocious 19-year-old genius is challenged to put her convictions to the test by venturing out on to the NYC dating scene.

recommendations.title: The Theory of Everything
recommendations.overview: The Theory of Everything is the extraordinary story of one of the world’s greatest living minds, the renowned astrophysicist Stephen Hawking, who falls deeply in love with fellow Cambridge student Jane Wilde.

recommendations.title: Yentl
recommendations.overview: In a time when girls were forbidden to study religious scriptures, a Jewish girl masquerades as a boy to enter religious training and unexpectedly finds love along the way.

recommendations.title: The Blue Caftan
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged tailor and his wife find their relationship challenged by the arrival of a handsome new apprentice.

recommendations.title: Bronco Billy
recommendations.overview: An idealistic, modern-day cowboy struggles to keep his Wild West show afloat in the face of hard luck and waning interest.

recommendations.title: Luca
recommendations.overview: Luca and his best friend Alberto experience an unforgettable summer on the Italian Riviera. But all the fun is threatened by a deeply-held secret: they are sea monsters from another world just below the water’s surface.

recommendations.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
recommendations.overview: A couple's attitudes are challenged when their daughter brings home a fiancé who is black.

recommendations.title: Nazarín
recommendations.overview: A Catholic priest in a poor community lives a charitable life in accordance with his religious principles, but others do not return the favor.

recommendations.title: The Prince of Egypt
recommendations.overview: The strong bond between two Royal Egyptian brothers is challenged when their chosen responsibilities set them at odds, with extraordinary consequences.
recommendations.director: Simon Wells, Steve Hickner, Brenda Chapman

recommendations.title: Simone: Woman of the Century
